The question is asking to compare the number of episodes in January 1995 versus October 1994. Since each row represents an episode and the "air month" column indicates when the episode aired, we need to group by the "air month" column to count the episodes for each month. We can use the f_group_column(air month) operation to group the episodes by their air month to analyze this situation.

The question is asking to compare the number of episodes in January 1995 to those in October 1994. To determine this, we need to sort the data based on the "series #" column in the order of "large to small" using the f_sort_column(series #) operation. This will allow us to see the number of episodes for each air month and compare the counts between January 1995 and October 1994.
In January, there were 3 episodes, while in October, there were 2 episodes. Therefore, there were more episodes in January 1995 than in October 1994.
